scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated genomic data; config generation is deterministic from input data.

practice_boundaries.detail: No medical conclusions; tool generates visualization configs only.

methodological_ground.detail: Standard Circos configuration format; no methodological fallacies.

code_usability.detail: Script is syntactically correct; graceful handling of missing data file; sample data generation works; custom tracks documented.

functional_suitability.note: Custom tracks section documented; data size check in workflow; rendering constraint in description and Output Requirements.

reliability.note: Missing --data handled with clear error; chromosome naming inconsistency flagged; data size check proactive.

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 204 lines — lean; data/ and circos.conf bundled appropriately.

agent_usability.note: Clear workflow with data size check step; custom tracks documented; Circos dependency constraint in description and Output Requirements.

human_usability.note: Description now includes rendering constraint; Circos dependency surfaced prominently.

security.note: No hardcoded secrets; no injection vectors; path traversal check for --data still not documented in Error Handling.

maintainability.note: Clean class structure; custom tracks documented; adding new track types requires extending _generate_custom_tracks.

agent_specific.note: Trigger precision good; escape hatches for variant calling and statistical analysis present; Circos dependency is a composability barrier.

key_strengths: Bundled sample data generation enables immediate testing without real data
Dual track type support (genomic variation + cell-cell communication) with appropriate visualization for each
Color scheme table with journal-specific presets (Nature, Lancet, Cell) is a practical differentiator
Rendering constraint in description frontmatter — visible before skill is triggered
Data size check proactively surfaced in workflow step 2 for datasets >5,000 rows

recommendations.title: Circos dependency not verified at runtime — no Quick Check command
recommendations.problem: The skill generates config files but cannot render them without Circos installed separately. No Quick Check command verifies Circos availability before the user runs the full workflow.
recommendations.root_cause: Circos is a Perl-based tool requiring separate installation; the skill cannot bundle it and does not surface a pre-flight check.
recommendations.fix: Add a Quick Check command: 'which circos || echo Circos not found — install via conda install -c bioconda circos'. Surface this in the Workflow as Step 0 before any config generation.

recommendations.title: No path traversal check for --data input file
recommendations.problem: The --data parameter accepts arbitrary file paths without documented path traversal rejection in Error Handling.
recommendations.root_cause: Error Handling section does not include a path validation rule for the data file input.
recommendations.fix: Add to Error Handling: 'If the --data path contains ../ or points outside the workspace, reject with a path traversal warning before opening the file.'
